title: New Media and Communication Program Learning Outcomes
content:
New Media and Communication Program Learning Outcomes

Program Learning Outcomes

1- Knows and categorizes the basic concepts, terminology, principles and theories of new media and communication.

2- To be equipped with the unique structure of the media that changes and transforms with digitalization.

3- To be able to cooperate with other disciplines in the field of social sciences by using the theoretical background of new media.

4- Applies the application area and digitalized structure of new media and communication, including its technical and managerial features.

5- Can practice digital reading at an advanced level and have an awareness of the problems of digital reading.

6- Have an awareness of digital media literacy and critical media literacy. Can evaluate original content created in the digital world from a critical perspective.

7- Uses new communication processes in the digitalizing world in a participatory and open to intercultural communication.

8- Produces and applies different digital content formats suitable for multi-media environments.

9- Is aware of working conditions and professional organizations in the field of new media.

10- Has professional competence in new media and communication technologies and digital media sector.

11- Follows new research paradigms specific to new media environments and uses current analysis methods, synthesizes and evaluates the results obtained.

12- Has the ability to design and implement the content, visuals and products of multimedia applications.

13- Can produce content for digital journalism applications. Can produce news with digital content such as visual data processing, video, audio, text writing, collaging, editing and planning projects.

14- Follow and critically evaluate the national and international agenda.

15- Has a flexible perspective to follow the ever-changing and digitalizing world.

16- Can create academic content for the media sector, which has gained new orientations with digital communication technologies.

17- Behaves in accordance with the principle of environmentalism and sustainability with high social sensitivity in the new world order.

18- Has an innovative and contemporary view of the future in order to produce solutions to new concepts and problems in a constantly digitalizing world.
